en_title: Microsoft Launches Test for Ad-Supported Xbox Game Streaming, Promises the Ads Will Not 'Interrupt the Flow of Gameplay'
cn_title: 微软测试广告支持的XBOX游戏流媒体，承诺不打断游戏
subtitle: 看两分钟广告玩一小时

paragraphs.en: Microsoft has launched a test for ad-supported Xbox game streaming, and promised the ads won't interrupt gameplay.
paragraphs.cn: 微软已启动广告支持的XBOX游戏流媒体测试，并承诺广告不会中断游戏过程。

paragraphs.en: The test lets users stream select games from their library for a limited time supported by adverts, and is available to Xbox Insiders. During this test period, Xbox Insiders with an Xbox account can stream supported games without a subscription for free with ads, with one-hour session limits across supported devices and regions where game streaming is available.
paragraphs.cn: 这项测试面向XBOX Insider，允许用户在广告支持下限时流播游戏库中的部分作品。测试期间，拥有XBOX账户的Insider无需订阅即可通过观看广告免费流播支持的游戏；在开放游戏流媒体的设备和地区，每次会话上限为一小时。

paragraphs.en: Ads will play before streaming sessions begin and will not interrupt gameplay, Microsoft insisted. The core game experience remains unchanged, the company added. Participation is optional, and players can choose other ways to play at any time.
paragraphs.cn: 微软强调，广告只会在流媒体会话开始前播放，不会中断游戏；核心游戏体验保持不变。参与测试完全自愿，玩家随时可以选择其他游玩方式。

paragraphs.en: The test is designed to help give more people more affordable ways to play on devices they already own, Microsoft explained. You can play after sitting through two minutes of ads. When your 1-hour session ends, you can play again after sitting through another set of ads, and your progress continues across your account and devices. It's also worth noting that today, Xbox Cloud Gaming is not available without a Game Pass subscription.
paragraphs.cn: 微软解释称，测试旨在让更多人以更低成本在已有设备上游玩。观看两分钟广告后即可开始游戏；一小时会话结束后，再看一组广告便可继续，进度会在账户和设备间延续。需要注意的是，目前没有Game Pass订阅便无法使用XBOX云游戏。

paragraphs.en: “For many players, the device they already own now allows them to stream games with Xbox,” Microsoft said. “Cloud can also help Xbox One owners play newer games built for Xbox Series X|S without needing to purchase new hardware right away. That can be especially meaningful in places where consoles are harder to find or less affordable, giving more players another way to access great games on devices they already have.
paragraphs.cn: 微软表示：「对许多玩家而言，他们已有的设备现在就能通过XBOX流播游戏。云服务还能帮助XBOX One用户游玩为XBOX Series X|S打造的新游戏，无需立刻购买新硬件。在主机更难买到或价格难以负担的地区，这一点尤其有意义，让更多玩家能在现有设备上以另一种方式接触优秀游戏。」

paragraphs.en: “Advertising has existed in gaming for decades, from in-game placements to free-to-play models. But it hasn’t always been built with the player in mind. When done well, advertising can help lower the cost of access. It creates another way for players to get into games without an upfront streaming purchase and expands audiences through new ways to play.
paragraphs.cn: 「广告在游戏中已存在数十年，从游戏内植入到免费游玩模式都有，但过去的设计并不总是以玩家为先。如果运用得当，广告可以降低使用门槛，让玩家无需预先购买流媒体服务也能进入游戏，并通过新的游玩方式扩大受众。」

paragraphs.en: “For brands, this only works if showing up here adds to the experience, not takes away from it.”
paragraphs.cn: 「对品牌而言，只有广告的出现能增进体验，而不是损害体验，这种模式才行得通。」

paragraphs.en: In a , Microsoft outlined the following guidelines for ad-supported game streaming:
paragraphs.cn: 微软在一份[原文此处缺失内容]中列出了以下广告支持游戏流媒体指南：

paragraphs.en: Microsoft said it will learn from the test and improve it based on feedback.
paragraphs.cn: 微软表示，将从测试中总结经验，并依据反馈加以改进。

paragraphs.en: The test of ad-supported Xbox game streaming arrives amid console price rises that are pushing some gaming hardware towards the $1,000 mark. Last month, Microsoft announced significant price rises for Xbox consoles , blaming the ongoing “components crisis.” In a blog post , Microsoft said that from August 1, the price of Xbox consoles will increase by $100 for 512GB models, and $150 for 1TB models. The 2TB model will be discontinued.
paragraphs.cn: 广告支持的XBOX游戏流媒体测试推出之际，主机价格不断上涨，部分游戏硬件正逼近1,000美元(约合人民币6780元)。上月，微软以持续的「组件危机」为由宣布XBOX主机大幅涨价。微软在博客中表示，自8月1日起，512GB机型涨价100美元(约合人民币678元)，1TB机型涨价150美元(约合人民币1017元)，2TB机型将停产。

paragraphs.en: “Last October, we increased Xbox console price by $20-$70 in the U.S.” Microsoft said at the time. “We hoped another price increase would not be necessary, and we have spent the last several months working with suppliers on options. Unfortunately, console storage and memory prices have increased by more than 2.5x and we expect another doubling by the fall of 2027.
paragraphs.cn: 微软当时表示：「去年10月，我们将美国市场的XBOX主机价格上调了20至70美元(约合人民币136至475元)。我们原本希望不必再次涨价，过去几个月也一直与供应商研究其他方案。遗憾的是，主机存储和内存价格已经上涨超过2.5倍，预计到2027年秋季还会再翻一番。」

paragraphs.en: "The entire consumer electronics industry is struggling with the current components crisis, but the effects are particularly hard on consoles. Unlike phones, computers, speakers, and other consumer devices, consoles are typically not sold at a profit, but instead for less than they cost to make.”
paragraphs.cn: 「整个消费电子行业都在当前的组件危机中挣扎，但主机受影响格外严重。与手机、电脑、音箱和其他消费设备不同，主机通常不以盈利为目的出售，售价反而低于制造成本。」

paragraphs.en: New Xbox CEO Asha Sharma has said the spiralling cost of new and existing consoles would require "radically different business models" over the coming generation. She added that the industry had "reached a point where it will be hard to imagine" mass audiences still being able to afford "thousands of dollars" for a new console generation.
paragraphs.cn: XBOX新任首席执行官Asha Sharma表示，新旧主机成本持续飙升，意味着下一世代需要「截然不同的商业模式」。她补充说，行业已经「走到一个难以想象」大众还能负担新一代主机「数千美元」价格的阶段。

paragraphs.en: The current PS5 and Xbox Series X and S generation of consoles have seen price increases rather than cost savings. Sony itself raised the price of PS5 consoles back in March , blaming “continued pressures in the global economic landscape.” Nintendo has also not been immune, and recently acknowledged it would up the price of Switch 2, just over a year after its arrival. And Valve has bemoaned its struggle to release Steam Machine at the price it had initially hoped , instead having to go for an eye-watering $1,049.
paragraphs.cn: 当前这一代PS5和XBOX Series主机都经历了涨价而非降价。索尼早在今年3月就已上调PS5售价，理由是「全球经济形势持续承压」，任天堂同样未能幸免，近期也承认将在Switch 2上市一年多一点后提价。Valve亦苦恼于无法以最初期望的价格推出Steam Machine，最终不得不定出1049美元(约合人民币7112元)这样令人肉疼的价格。

paragraphs.en: With this context, it's easy to see why Microsoft would want to introduce ad-supported Xbox game streaming now. I imagine Sharma also has an eye on the response to the test ahead of any potential introduction of ad-supported gaming on the non-streaming side.
paragraphs.cn: 在这样的背景下，不难理解微软为何此时推出广告支持的XBOX游戏流媒体。可以想见，Sharma也会关注测试反响，为未来可能在非流媒体游戏中引入广告支持模式作参考。

paragraphs.en: The test also comes amid what Sharma has called the most significant restructure in Xbox history. 1,600 staff were cut from Microsoft’s gaming business earlier this month, with another 1,600 to go over the current financial year. Four studios have left the business, with another on the way out.
paragraphs.cn: 测试还发生在Sharma所称的XBOX史上最大规模重组期间。本月早些时候，微软游戏业务已裁员1,600人，本财年还将再裁1,600人；已有四家工作室离开该业务，另有一家即将退出。

paragraphs.en: “Our business today is not healthy,” Sharma said. “We are operating at margins that are 3-10x lower than comparable platform and publishing businesses. We entered Gen 9 with a smaller install base and a higher cost structure. To grow, we bet on Game Pass, multi-platform, and a broader portfolio of content. While those businesses have created meaningful value, they did not grow at the pace we expected. As that happened, our core business weakened, and we added more teams, more investment, and more time, hoping for a better outcome. And now the industry is facing the most severe hardware crisis in its history. We must reset Xbox.”
paragraphs.cn: Sharma表示：「我们今天的业务并不健康。我们的利润率比同类平台和发行商业务低3至10倍。进入第九世代时，我们的装机量更小、成本结构更高。为了增长，我们押注Game Pass、多平台和更广泛的内容组合。虽然这些业务创造了显著价值，却没有按预期速度增长。与此同时，核心业务走弱，我们投入更多团队、资金和时间，希望得到更好的结果。如今行业又面临史上最严重的硬件危机，我们必须重置XBOX。」

paragraphs.en: Yesterday, Microsoft announced Xbox Backward Compatibility on PC , allowing you to play classic console games on PC and handhelds such as the Xbox Ally X for the first time.
paragraphs.cn: 昨天，微软宣布XBOX向下兼容功能登陆PC，让玩家首次可以在PC及XBOX Ally X等掌机上游玩经典主机游戏。

summary: 微软正测试广告支持的XBOX游戏流媒体：无需订阅，观看约两分钟广告后可免费游玩一小时，广告不会中断游戏。测试推出之际，主机价格因组件危机持续上涨，微软也正经历XBOX史上最大规模重组。
opus_summary: 微软尝试用广告降低云游戏门槛：玩家看两分钟广告即可免费流播一小时，且广告只在会话前出现。面对主机价格逼近千美元、硬件成本飙升和业务利润率承压，XBOX正在寻找全新的商业模式。
